title: pouteria latianthera
intro: Pouteria latianthera, also known as the Brazilian cherry or guanabara, is a species of plant native to the tropical regions of South America, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. Pouteria latianthera has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antioxidant properties. Pouteria latianthera is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
